description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on every pull request to main and branches matching *code-ql*, ignoring paths under docs/, and on a weekly schedule. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents, and write permission for security events. Run a matrix strategy across javascript and python languages, checking out the code, initializing CodeQL with a config file and specified languages and queries, autobuilding for javascript and python, and then performing CodeQL analysis.
